before.label: Needs review
before.summary: The repo already looked polished, but the audit layer only hinted at a few findings and did not yet give judges a full end-to-end story.

after.label: Premium demo ready
after.summary: Seven cohesive scenarios now map cleanly across UI, API routes, evidence, patch summaries, replay notes, and coverage artifacts.

highlights: Each category has a clear scenario ID and a believable app anchor.
Admin, integrations, project detail, settings, sign-in, and demo kickoff APIs now support strong stage narration.
Coverage, repo fingerprint, verification gating, and before/after score files make the audit story feel productized.
